title: Create date in board 2  based on a date in board 1
excerpt:
Hello! 
I have 2 boards. 
in board 1 the customer sets a date, and then I would like a date to be generated on the second board which is 90 days before the date the customer has set. 
I have tried all possible solutions …

posts.author: EmmaBrinch (Emma Brinch)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello!

I have 2 boards.
in board 1 the customer sets a date, and then I would like a date to be generated on the second board which is 90 days before the date the customer has set.
I have tried all possible solutions but can’t quite hit the right one.

posts.author: Fantasy-Media-Team (Fantasy Media Team)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @EmmaBrinch

We’ve developed an app called Connected Boards Automations. Which allows to run robust automations on connected boards column.

Assuming the items on the two boards are connected (via connected boards), here’s how it can be used in this case.

Whenever the date is inputed, simply change status to something that indicates the date is ready and set 90 days offset.

Screenshot 2025-01-23 at 18.20.342150×638 54.7 KB

You can find it in the monday.com app marketplace in the platform or here - https://monday.com/marketplace/listing/10000321/connected-boards-automations-

Hope that helps!
